html:
Exclusive to:

The Black Flag is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be obtained by destroying a Moon Quay Pirate Banner. Its use is to either re-create the Banner or to craft Polly Roger's Hat.

Usage

×2

Exclusive to:
“Gentleman Pirate-Scientist does have a bit of a ring to it.”
–Wilson
“Looks like it's already charred.”
–Willow
“Is flag burnt? No, is just black.”
–Wolfgang
“Black, like a mourning shroud.”
–Wendy
“WHY DOES IT NOT HAVE MY FACE ON IT”
–WX-78
“Historically, pirates also sailed under red or white flags.”
–Wickerbottom
“I like my flags with a maple leaf on 'em.”
–Woodie
“Black never goes out of style.”
–Maxwell
“A banner of ill omen.”
–Wigfrid
“We drew a scary skull on it! But we used black ink...”
–Webber
“I don't know how comfortable I feel sailing under a pirate flag...”
–Warly
“Lots of black. Friend hair color better”
–Wormwood
“Not the cheeriest, is it?”
–Winona
“It's inspiring me to make a little mischief of my own.”
–Wortox
“It pirate flag!”
–Wurt
“I should paint something friendly on it, so people know we're helpful pirates.”
–Walter
“Such an ominous color...”
–Wanda
The Black Flag is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be obtained by destroying a Moon Quay Pirate Banner. Its use is to either re-create the Banner or to craft Polly Roger's Hat.

The '''Black Flag''' is an [[item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. It can be obtained by destroying a [[Moon Quay Pirate Banner]]. Its use is to either re-create the Banner or to craft [[Polly Roger's Hat]].
